title: Depend on imported targets, not raw paths
description: Link against the namespaced imported target a package exports rather than hardcoding library file paths and include directories.
body: Use when consuming an external library through find_package or FetchContent. Do not hardcode absolute library paths or guessed include directories. Actions: call find_package and link the documented imported target such as Foo::foo; let its INTERFACE properties carry includes and transitive deps. Validation signals include a build that relocates to another machine without editing paths, and missing dependencies surfacing at configure time rather than link time. Risk boundary: hardcoded paths break on other platforms and toolchains, so always prefer the package's exported target.
